raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current priorities","name":"What are you prioritising right now that might not be obvious to others?","description":"Surfaces the individual's current focus and potential misalignment with perceived priorities.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Visible impact","name":"Where do you feel your impact has been most visible recently?","description":"Explores areas where the individual believes they have made a significant impact.","purpose":"competency","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder trust","name":"How do you feel about your relationship with the board and execs right now?","description":"Probes the quality of relationships with key stakeholders.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy consistency","name":"Has your energy been consistent, or are there peaks and troughs?","description":"Identifies fluctuations in energy levels that might not be immediately evident.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Strategic influence","name":"How confident are you in your strategic influence this quarter?","description":"Assesses confidence in strategic decision-making and influence.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What kind of support would make the biggest difference for you right now?","description":"Explores what support the individual feels they need.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Alignment with team","name":"Is there any part of the team's direction that feels unclear or misaligned to you?","description":"Checks for any misalignment or lack of clarity with the team's direction.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Sustainable workload","name":"Does your current workload feel sustainable for the next few months?","description":"Assesses if the workload is manageable and sustainable.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Future focus","name":"What are you most excited to focus on after current projects wrap up?","description":"Surfaces areas of future interest and excitement.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next steps","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Drives towards actionable steps for the next period.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
